evals.prompt: Please render the PlantUML file at tests/diagram.puml into a PNG.
evals.expected_output: A PNG image is generated next to the source file (tests/diagram.png) and the run reports successful rendering.

assertions.text: Run transcript includes skill-script status line 'Rendering diagram for ...' before rendering.
Run transcript includes script success line 'Success! Diagram rendered:' followed by the output path.
Creates tests/diagram.png next to the input .puml file and file size is greater than 0 bytes.

evals.prompt: I pasted a class diagram into tests/system-design.puml. Render it to an image and keep the output in the same folder.
evals.expected_output: The renderer is invoked for tests/system-design.puml and produces tests/system-design.png in the same directory.

assertions.text: Run transcript includes skill-script status line mentioning tests/system-design.puml.
Run transcript includes script success line 'Success! Diagram rendered:' followed by the output path.
Creates tests/system-design.png in the same directory as tests/system-design.puml and file size is greater than 0 bytes.

evals.prompt: Render tests/broken-sequence.puml. If rendering fails, tell me what likely went wrong and give me an online fallback to generate or validate quickly.
evals.expected_output: On failure, the response clearly reports likely causes (missing @startuml/@enduml delimiters or syntax issues) and provides the fallback URL https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/uml/.

assertions.text: Response includes the exact fallback URL https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/uml/.
Response mentions at least one likely cause: missing @startuml/@enduml delimiters, syntax issues, or refers to the script's error output about syntax problems.
Script exits with a non-zero exit code (expected exit code 6 for no PNG generated).

evals.expected_output: The agent saves the inline PlantUML to a .puml file, runs the render script on it, and confirms the PNG was generated.

assertions.text: A .puml file is created on disk containing the @startuml/@enduml block from the prompt.
The render script is invoked on the saved .puml file (transcript shows 'Rendering diagram for ...').
A PNG file is generated next to the .puml file and file size is greater than 0 bytes.

evals.prompt: Try to render a PlantUML file at path/that/does/not/exist.puml and let me know what happens.
evals.expected_output: The script reports exit code 5 (input file not found) and the agent explains the file was not found.

assertions.text: Run transcript includes the error message 'Error: Input file not found:' from the render script.
The agent explains to the user that the file does not exist at the specified path.
